symptoms_text: Severe chest pain with sweating and nausea, pain radiating to left arm
Sudden weakness on one side, slurred speech, possible stroke
Shortness of breath and wheezing, asthma attack, difficulty breathing
High fever with chills and body ache for 2 days
Skin rash with itching after new soap
Pregnancy with abdominal pain and bleeding
Ear pain with reduced hearing and sore throat
Knee pain after fall with swelling
